message:
feat(node): feature-gate 7 runtime modules behind extended-surfaces

Continues the extended-surfaces feature-gating sweep in the runtime
subsystem. Gates the following modules behind
#[cfg(any(test, feature = "extended-surfaces"))] so they compile for
tests but are excluded from production builds:

- anti_entropy: state reconciliation protocol
- crash_loop_detector: restart frequency analysis
- hardware_planner: resource allocation planning
- incident_lab: incident simulation environment
- isolation_mesh: workload isolation boundaries
- safe_mode: degraded operation fallback
- time_travel: snapshot replay engine

These modules are development/testing infrastructure that adds
significant compilation overhead without being needed in the default
production binary.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
